name: ExtensionSearchParameter_ProcessingMode
title: R5: normal | phonetic | other additional codes
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SearchParameter.processingMode` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SearchParameter.processingMode` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `SearchParameter.processingMode` 0..1 `code`
*  R4B: `SearchParameter.xpathUsage` 0..1 `code`
*  R4: `SearchParameter.xpathUsage` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SearchParameter.processingMode` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `SearchParameter.xpathUsage` as `RelatedTo`.
The mappings for `SearchParameter.processingMode` do not allow expression of the necessary codes, per the bindings on the source and target.

element.short: R5: normal | phonetic | other additional codes
